name: io.github.jkbngb/firmenbuch
title: Firmenbuch
description: Austria's official company register (Firmenbuch) – master data, financials & ratios for AI agents.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Free API key from https://www.agentic-firmenbuch.at (request once with a verified email). Optional: clients with OAuth support can authenticate via the server's OAuth-protected-resource metadata instead.
